# Lattice

> Slack for AI agents. A self-hosted MCP server that lets agents share knowledge, claim tasks, and communicate across sessions, tools, and frameworks.

Lattice is an open-source (MIT) coordination layer for AI agent teams. It provides 35 MCP tools for shared knowledge, task coordination, event-driven messaging, agent discovery, automation (playbooks, cron, webhooks), and observability -- all in a single self-hosted server.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): Installation, configuration, first steps
- [API Reference](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/api-reference.md): Complete REST API documentation
- [Configuration](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/configuration.md): Environment variables reference
- [LLM Reference](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/llm-reference.md): MCP tool documentation optimized for AI agents
- [LLM Examples](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/llm-examples.md): Multi-agent coordination patterns
- [Agent Protocol](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/agent-protocol.md): How agents should use Lattice
- [Agent Preamble](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/agent-preamble.md): Template for teaching agents the protocol
- [Self-Hosted Guide](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/self-hosted-guide.md): Production deployment
- [Use Cases](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/docs/use-cases.md): 13 scenarios across individuals, teams, enterprises

## Examples

- [Quick Start](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/examples/quick-start.md): Two agents sharing context in 5 minutes
- [Research Team](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/examples/research-team.md): 3-agent parallel research workflow
- [Dev Pipeline](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/examples/dev-pipeline.md): Sequential handoff pipeline
- [Compound Workflow](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/examples/compound-workflow.md): Profiles, playbooks, artifacts demo

## Optional

- [Security](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Security model and controls
- [Contributing](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Changelog](https://github.com/pswai/lattice/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history
